title: Are anger and arrogance configurations of only the hearts down, or the mind down?

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
gideon : Mind is head / husband .

               The mind receives data , Feelings 
                and relatings Then strategizes
             ..  and directs the spaces Towards/into
                 said configuration . though the 
                 heart May play an undiscernible
                 yet powerfull role The mind
                  still directs the spaces .
